hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
inner_city_transportation_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='transportation': inner_city_transportation_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=not({"walk", "taxi"}&inner_city_transportation_set)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] != "airplane" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] != "airplane" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 3 people traveling from Suzhou to Wuhan for 3 days. We need to meet any one of the following: 1. Do not want to use walking or taxis for intra-city travel. 2. Do not want to take an airplane to the destination, and do not want to take an airplane back.
